title: NQBlade (Trading Bot)
author: Some_Fly_4552
selftext:
Hello, here’s a performance from last year August till now. You can see it performs very very well. If you are interested in trying it, we are offering a free trial week so you can look at it and test it✌️ DM me for more.

Description: 

NQBlade is a rule-based NAS100 trading bot designed to trade with structure rather than emotion. It follows a trend-based approach and uses multiple layers of confirmation to identify higher-quality setups.

The bot focuses on market direction, timing, and risk control, with the goal of avoiding random entries and managing trades in a disciplined way. Positions are handled with defined stop loss protection, partial profit-taking, and trailing management to balance downside protection with upside potential.

Overall, NQBlade is built to combine consistency, structure, and controlled execution in one system.

comments.author: Witalson
comments.body: You can't really tell much from these backtests. There's a return, but the time frame is super short. You can't see any real drawdowns—maybe you've been holding on too long, and the testing period is too short.

replies.author: Some_Fly_4552
replies.body: There are videos on my account from 2021-2026 backtests, you can check it out, this is just a small period yes. But as I said there’s multiple videos on my account

replies.author: Witalson
replies.body: [https://getradiant.tech/algorithms](https://getradiant.tech/algorithms)   This is how I show my backtests and real-world performance. I think it's clearer this way.

replies.author: Some_Fly_4552
replies.body: Looks decent but I think it’s better with a broker statement✌️

replies.author: Witalson
replies.body: I'm wondering how to display a broker's statement for a specific asset—cryptocurrency, no less—and make it look good. I've already made everything as transparent as possible. But the project will include a transaction log and real-time transaction updates. That's a better approach than just showing a statement.

comments.author: ronnooi
comments.body: Please show live account. Anybody can be a back test millionaire.

replies.body: We have got a broker statement too if you want it DM me can’t post it in here in the comments
